Description: Define routes using Slim's PSR-7 compatible router with middleware groups
Do: Use route groups with middleware. Define routes with closures or class methods
Dont: Mix routing patterns or skip middleware
Code Bad: $app->get('/posts', function ($req, $res) { ... });\n$app->post('/posts', function ($req, $res) { ... });\n// No grouping, inline handlers, no middleware

Description: Use PSR-15 middleware for request/response processing
Do: Create middleware implementing MiddlewareInterface. Add globally or per-route
Dont: Put cross-cutting logic in route handlers

Description: Use PHP-DI or any PSR-11 container for dependency injection in Slim
Do: Configure container with definitions. Let controllers resolve dependencies automatically
Dont: Create dependencies manually in route handlers

Description: Use Slim's built-in error middleware for consistent error responses
Do: Add ErrorMiddleware with custom error handler. Return consistent JSON errors
Dont: Let raw exceptions leak to users
Code Bad: // No error handler:\n// Raw PHP errors and stack traces shown to users\n// Different error format per endpoint

Description: Build responses using PSR-7 response interface properly
Do: Use Response body write and proper status codes. Return JSON consistently
Dont: Echo output or use header() directly

Description: Test Slim applications by creating the app in tests and making requests
Do: Create app factory for test reuse. Test all HTTP methods and error cases
Dont: Test handlers in isolation without HTTP context
